title: ctenitis connexa
intro: Ctenitis connexa is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis connexa are said to include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its herbal remedies, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and safety.
